notes: Chunk 74 DONE (Template D, Tier B, 25 new routes, 1 block) + Blog Day 27 (replace in place). Gap analysis confirmed the established hub-market set (UK/US/CA/AU/DE/FR/IT/NL/ES/PT/BE/AT/CH/CZ/PL/HU/DK/SE/NO/FI/GR/IE/UAE) x the 15-country low-tier cluster from chunks 61-73 (Uruguay/Jamaica/Dominican Republic/Panama/Rwanda/Lebanon/Uganda/Georgia/Armenia/Kazakhstan/Azerbaijan/Estonia/Lithuania/Latvia/Slovenia) is now fully saturated (0 missing pairs either direction). Chunk 74 opens a new cluster: Turkey, crossed with that same 15-country set. 15 new X-to-Turkey routes (Uruguay/Jamaica/Dominican Republic/Panama/Rwanda/Lebanon/Uganda/Georgia/Armenia/Kazakhstan/Azerbaijan/Estonia/Lithuania/Latvia/Slovenia to Turkey) plus 10 new Turkey-to-X routes (Turkey to Lebanon/Georgia/Armenia/Azerbaijan/Kazakhstan/Estonia/Latvia/Lithuania/Slovenia/Rwanda), leaving Turkey-to-Uruguay/Jamaica/Dominican-Republic/Panama/Uganda (5) for a future chunk. Safety-critical correction made during research: the site's own data/countries_pet_regulations.json Turkey entry, and several older Turkey route files (e.g. germany-to-turkey.md's structured titre_test field), state Turkey does not routinely require a rabies titre test. Cross-checked against USDA APHIS's official Turkey pet import guidance and multiple independent sources: Turkey DOES require a FAVN/RNATT titre test from unlisted origins, blood drawn 30+ days post-vaccination, 90-day wait from the draw date, 0.5 IU/ml minimum, 21-day quarantine penalty for non-compliance. All 25 new files use the corrected requirement; the data file and older Turkey route files (germany-to-turkey.md confirmed inconsistent between its structured field and its own prose) are flagged below for a future correction pass. Also corrected Turkey's banned-breed list: the data file names only 2 breeds (Pit Bull, Japanese Tosa); verified via Turkish Law No. 5199 (amended 2021) the list is broader (adds American Staffordshire Terrier, Staffordshire Bull Terrier, Fila Brasileiro, Dogo Argentino, Rottweiler). Verified Georgia/Armenia/Azerbaijan/Kazakhstan do not require a titre test from any origin (confirmed per-country, not just for EU origins as older site precedent implied). Verified Turkish Airlines operates a genuine non-stop cargo route Panama City-Istanbul and Kigali-Istanbul, real differentiators used on those two pages. The Armenia pages (both directions) feature a genuinely new fact: Turkish Airlines launched its first-ever scheduled Istanbul-Yerevan flights on 11 March 2026 (now 14 weekly), while the Turkey-Armenia land border has stayed closed since 1993 and the two countries still have no diplomatic relations. The Georgia pages note the Sarpi land border crossing as a real overland alternative to flying. All 25 files verified structurally (valid YAML, requirements blocks are keyed maps, template_variant D, Marcus Webb byline) and QA-scanned for zero em dashes, zero banned vocabulary, zero curly quotes, zero dead /pet-transport/routes/ paths, no email/phone mentions; zero exact-sentence overlap between the four structurally-similar Estonia/Latvia/Lithuania/Slovenia sibling pages in either direction. Blog Day 27: uk-to-ireland-pet-transport-guide.md replaced in place (Marcus Webb), full rewrite from a thin 2026-05-06 stub. Corrected two things the old stub got wrong: the 'PETS scheme' framing (that scheme ended for Great Britain in January 2021; today's requirement is the Animal Health Certificate) and the ferry routing (Liverpool's ferry serves Belfast, not Dublin; Holyhead-Dublin on Stena Line/Irish Ferries is the direct route, with free pet travel and free but limited kennels). Confirmed via web search the Ireland dog tapeworm rule (24-120 hours pre-arrival) applies to GB dogs. Routes 6,271 -> 6,296, pages 7,075 -> 7,100. Two data-quality flags added below for a future correction pass (Turkey titre test, Turkey banned-breed list). Chunk 75 (Template E, Tier B) is next; Turkey-to-Uruguay/Jamaica/Dominican-Republic/Panama/Uganda (5 routes) remain to close out the Turkey cluster.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
